project: 测试项目 - 城市孤独系列
original_requirement: 表现城市雨夜中一个人的孤独感，要有电影感，忧郁氛围

version_1.prompt: cinematic film still of a lonely man walking on rainy city street at night, neon lights reflecting on wet pavement, blue-green color palette, asymmetrical composition, moody lighting, dramatic shadows, masterpiece, best quality, ultra detailed, photorealistic, shot on 35mm film --ar 9:16 --style raw --stylize 100
version_1.strategy: 精准型，详细描述每个视觉元素
version_1.director_feedback: 光影效果很好，但人物表情不够忧郁

version_2.prompt: lonely figure in rainy city night, cinematic lighting, melancholic mood, blue tones --ar 9:16 --style raw
version_2.strategy: 简洁型，给AI更多创作空间
version_2.director_feedback: 氛围不错，但细节不够丰富

version_3.prompt: art film still, urban solitude, rain as metaphor for tears, neon dreams reflected in puddles, memory of lost connections, cinematic poetry --ar 9:16 --style raw --stylize 150
version_3.director_feedback: 概念很好，但执行不够具体

what_worked_well: 蓝绿色调符合胡导的视觉偏好
不对称构图增强了孤独感
霓虹灯反射效果很有电影感
广角镜头视角增加了空间感
improvement_suggestions: 可以增加更多环境细节（如商店招牌、车辆）

key_insights: 胡导对光影效果要求很高，特别是反射光
人物情绪表达需要更具体的关键词
蓝绿色调+雨夜是胡导的经典组合
lessons_learned.prompt_pattern_extracted: cinematic + [场景] + [情绪关键词] + [色调] + [构图] + [光影效果] + quality keywords
lessons_learned.template_applicability: 可以转化为城市雨夜场景模板

evolution_applied.preference_updated: 在style-preferences.json中强化了雨景和反射光的偏好
evolution_applied.prompt_library_enhanced: 增加了'忧郁表情'的具体描述词库

final_output.selected_prompt: cinematic film still of a lonely man with melancholic expression walking on rainy city street at night, neon lights reflecting on wet pavement, blue-green color palette, asymmetrical composition, moody lighting, dramatic shadows, detailed raindrops, reflections in puddles, masterpiece, best quality, ultra detailed, photorealistic, shot on 35mm film --ar 9:16 --style raw --stylize 100
final_output.director_comment: 这次很接近我想要的感觉，特别是光影和色调。可以用于实际项目。
